questions.question: What does "Sebbene fosse stanco, ha continuato a lavorare" mean in English?
options: Although he was tired, he continued to work
Because he was tired, he continued working
While he was tired, he worked
If he was tired, he would continue working
questions.correct_answer: Although he was tired, he continued to work
questions.audio: Sebbene fosse stanco, ha continuato a lavorare

questions.question: What does "Vorrei che tu venissi alla festa" mean in English?
options: I would like you to come to the party
I like that you come to the party
I would like if you came to the party
I want you coming to the party
questions.correct_answer: I would like you to come to the party
questions.audio: Vorrei che tu venissi alla festa

questions.question: What does "Se avessi saputo, avrei telefonato prima" mean in English?
options: If I had known, I would have called earlier
If I knew, I would call earlier
If I know, I call earlier
If I would know, I call
questions.correct_answer: If I had known, I would have called earlier
questions.audio: Se avessi saputo, avrei telefonato prima

questions.question: What does "La situazione è peggiorata negli ultimi mesi" mean in English?
options: The situation has gotten worse in recent months
questions.correct_answer: The situation has gotten worse in recent months
questions.audio: La situazione è peggiorata negli ultimi mesi

questions.question: What does "Credo che sia importante studiare le lingue" mean in English?
options: I believe that it is important to study languages
I think that languages are important
I know that studying languages matters
questions.correct_answer: I believe that it is important to study languages
questions.audio: Credo che sia importante studiare le lingue

questions.question: What does "L'industria italiana ha una lunga tradizione" mean in English?
options: The Italian industry has a long tradition
The industry of Italy has a tradition
questions.correct_answer: The Italian industry has a long tradition
questions.audio: L'industria italiana ha una lunga tradizione

questions.question: Complete the sentence: Pensavo che lui ___ medico
questions.correct_answer: fosse

questions.correct_answer: sia

questions.question: Complete the sentence: Mi piacerebbe ___ in Italia l'anno prossimo
questions.correct_answer: andare

questions.question: Complete the sentence: Quando ___arrivato, tutti ___già seduti
questions.correct_answer: sono|erano

questions.question: Complete the sentence: Se ___ potessi, ___ un giro del mondo
questions.correct_answer: lo|farei

questions.question: Complete the sentence: Non penso che ___ una buona idea
questions.correct_answer: sia

questions.question: Listen and choose what you heard.
options: I prefer that you study more
questions.correct_answer: I prefer that you study more
questions.audio: Preferisco che tu studi di più

questions.question: Listen and choose what you heard.
options: It is possible that they will not come
It is possible that they do not come
It is possible that they came not
questions.correct_answer: It is possible that they will not come

questions.question: Listen and choose what you heard.
options: I would have liked to see him
I would like to see him
It would please me to see him
questions.correct_answer: I would have liked to see him

questions.question: Listen and choose what you heard.
questions.correct_answer: The economy is in decline

questions.question: Listen and choose what you heard.
options: Because of the difficulties, we continue
questions.correct_answer: Despite the difficulties, we continue

questions.question: Listen and choose what you heard.
options: It was necessary that we leave early
It was necessary that we left early
It is necessary that we leave early
It was necessary that we are leaving
questions.correct_answer: It was necessary that we leave early

questions.question: Translate to target language: "I would go if I had time"
questions.correct_answer: Andrei se avessi tempo

questions.question: Translate to target language: "Although it was cold, we went out"
questions.correct_answer: Sebbene facesse freddo, siamo usciti

questions.question: Translate to target language: "He was working when I arrived"
questions.correct_answer: Lavorava quando sono arrivato

questions.question: Translate to target language: "I think you should rest"
questions.correct_answer: Penso che tu debba riposare

questions.question: Translate to target language: "Unless he calls, we will leave"

questions.correct_answer: A meno che non chiami, partiremo

questions.question: Translate to target language: "It is important that everyone understands"
questions.correct_answer: È importante che tutti capiscano

questions.question: Your boss wants you to complete a project by Friday. You are unsure if you can. What do you say?
options: Non so se riuscirò a finirlo entro venerdì
Non so se riesco finirlo venerdì
questions.correct_answer: Non so se riuscirò a finirlo entro venerdì

questions.question: You want to express doubt about a plan. What do you say?
options: Dubito che sia una buona idea
Dubito se sia una buona idea
Non dubito che è una buona idea
questions.correct_answer: Dubito che sia una buona idea

questions.question: You want to express regret about something you did not do. What do you say?
options: Mi dispiace di non averlo fatto
Mi dispiace che non l'ho fatto
questions.correct_answer: Mi dispiace di non averlo fatto

questions.question: You heard some news and want to confirm it with someone. What do you ask?
options: È vero che hanno chiuso il negozio?
questions.correct_answer: È vero che hanno chiuso il negozio?

questions.question: You want to describe something that happened in the past while something else was happening. What tense do you use?
options: Il passato remoto e il passato prossimo
Il condizionale e il passato remoto
questions.correct_answer: L'imperfetto e il passato prossimo

questions.question: A colleague failed to complete work. You want to express that it was necessary they finish on time. What do you say?
options: Era importante che finisse in tempo
Sarebbe importante che finisce in tempo
È importante che ha finito in tempo
Fosse importante che finisse in tempo
questions.correct_answer: Era importante che finisse in tempo
